race.comment: BRASS MONKEYS (4) missed narrowly two back before bumping into a smart one last start at this track and trip. He sat handy there and was clearly second best on that occasion. Doesn't face anything like that here and he maps to get every chance again. Can go one better this time. SPIRITUAL STAR (7) finished off nicely last start after getting well back in the run, finishing 1.7L off the winner at Moruya. Boudvillain hopping on board is a positive sign and the wet deck is no issue. She can be storming home late in the race. RECKLESS BEHAVIOUR (6) was solid on resumption without a trial, finishing 2.8L off the winner at Nowra. He now gets the blinkers first time and he's a second-up winner in the past. Can improve quickly. OLINGTON LANE (2) is a progressive 3YO and can't be discounted despite the big weight, jumping favourite in the race a lot of these come through. PLATINUM RIDGE (5) has claims from the inside barrier.
